results.title: Top 10 things to do in New York City with kids - Austin Travels Magazine
results.content: The first time our daughter ever traveled to New York City, she was enamored by the bright lights and colorful sights of Times Square but never made it into a Broadway theater. While her older brothers, who had just turned 4 and 7, can still vaguely recall a few stand out New York moments –– riding the 60-foot indoor Ferris wheel inside Toys “R” Us (which closed permanently a few months after our visit), staring up at the gigantic dinosaurs inside the American Museum of Natural History, and meeting Batman and Darth Vader in Times Square –– she was too young to recollect anything about that first trip. Fast forward a decade, and she finally got to experience the captivating magic of New York City on her own two feet rather than from our arms or inside her stroller. If you’re planning to visit New York City with kids, here are 10 top Manhattan musts recommended through the lens of a 10-year-old.

results.title: Free or Low-Cost Activities for Families - Child Care
results.content: The Growing Up NYC website features seasonal ideas for things to do as a family throughout the year in New York City - check out the Free Events section where you can find virtual events you can attend from home. You can also find Year Round Programs and places to explore as a family. New York City’s public libraries offer a huge variety of virtual and in-person events, including for families with young children. Check out the The New York Public Library (which serves the Bronx, Staten Island, and Manhattan), The Brooklyn Public Library, or the Queens Public Library. Having an IDNYC provides access to a wide variety of services and programs offered by the City and can be used to acquire you free or discounted admissions to many places across NYC. NYC Parks offers a multitude of events, programs and activities designed with kids in mind. Many museums in New York City are always free – or offer free days or times to attend.

We brought the kids to New York for the first time a few years ago and they loved it. Most of the reasons that I fell in love with New York the first time I visited, were the same for my kids. Just being in New York with kids is an attraction in itself, but while you are there you may as well take in some of the highlights. results.title: 20 Incredible Things to do in New York with Kids [+ Where to Eat & Stay]
results.content: # 20 Incredible Things to do in New York with Kids [+ Where to Eat & Stay]. Read on to plan your trip to New York with kids today using our Ultimate Guide to New York with Kids. Ultimate Guid to New York with Kids. I was a little apprehensive about traveling to New York with kids. Quickly, I realized this is one of my favorite cities and we have returned numerous time. There is an endless amount of things to do in NYC with kids, amazing places to stay, and incredible food. Despite our kids being seasoned travelers, I’ll admit—I was a little nervous the first time we took them to New York City. But it didn’t take long for us to fall in love with the energy, the endless things to do, and just how family-friendly the city could actually be. ## 20 Things To Do in New York with Kids. traveling to new york with kids.
